purpose: Product in front of cherry blossom backdrop with petals in motion.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Soft romantic product photography of {product_descriptor} appearing to float in front of soft cherry blossom backdrop with pink blossoms in soft focus, several scattered pink petals frozen mid-fall around product, soft directional natural light, dreamy pastel atmosphere, shot on 85mm at f/2.8, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T27. Saudi adaptation guidance: Less culturally specific but works for international-leaning premium beauty. Strong for spring fragrance launches Feb-April. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per month during spring.
